package.name: ikt_core
package.description: Robot-agnostic, ROS-free inverse-kinematics core: a Pinocchio-backed weighted LM-DLS solver addressable by frame/joint name, with multi-tip and arbitrary-link / virtual-tool-frame pose solving, per-DOF task stiffness, joint limits, singularity robustness, rest-posture bias, arm-angle (S-R-S) redundancy control, a dual-arm relative-pose constraint, a reachability verdict, and a high-level IK class + solve_ik() one-liner. Loads a URDF from a file, a .xacro, stdin or a raw string, and ships small sample URDFs. Pure Python (numpy + pinocchio); imports no rclpy, so it is usable as an ordinary Python library as well as a colcon/ament package. Advisory only: it returns joint solutions, never commands a robot.
